title: useDeviceInfo
description: Returns details about the user’s device, such as type, orientation, OS, or screen size.
summary: Retrieves information about the current device and environment.

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-device-info",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useState } from "react";\r
import { getOSAuto } from "./use-os";\r
\r
export interface DeviceInfo {\r
  os: string;\r
  userAgent: string;\r
  language: string;\r
  orientation: string;\r
  screenWidth: number;\r
  screenHeight: number;\r
  devicePixelRatio: number;\r
  isTouchDevice: boolean;\r
  publicIp: string | undefined;\r
  deviceMemory: number | undefined;\r
  hardwareConcurrency: number | undefined;\r
}\r
\r
export function useDeviceInfo(): DeviceInfo {\r
  const useIsomorphicEffect = typeof document !== "undefined" ? useLayoutEffect : useEffect;\r
  const [info, setInfo] = useState<DeviceInfo>({\r
    os: "undetermined",\r
    userAgent: "",\r
    language: "",\r
    orientation: "landscape-primary",\r
    screenWidth: 0,\r
    screenHeight: 0,\r
    devicePixelRatio: 1,\r
    isTouchDevice: false,\r
    publicIp: undefined,\r
    deviceMemory: undefined,\r
    hardwareConcurrency: undefined\r
  });\r
\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    async function fetchPublicIp() {\r
      try {\r
        const response = await fetch("https://api.ipify.org?format=json");\r
        const data = await response.json();\r
        setInfo(prev => ({\r
          ...prev,\r
          publicIp: data.ip\r
        }));\r
      } catch (err) {\r
        console.error("Error fetching public IP:", err);\r
      }\r
    }\r
    async function fetchOs() {\r
      try {\r
        const model = await getOSAuto(navigator.userAgent);\r
        setInfo(prev => ({\r
          ...prev,\r
          os: model.device.name\r
        }));\r
      } catch (err) {\r
        console.error("Error fetching OS:", err);\r
      }\r
    }\r
\r
    const updates = (event?: Event) => {\r
      const target = event?.currentTarget as ScreenOrientation;\r
      setInfo(prev => ({\r
        ...prev,\r
        userAgent: navigator.userAgent,\r
        language: navigator.language,\r
        screenWidth: window.screen.width,\r
        screenHeight: window.screen.height,\r
        devicePixelRatio: window.devicePixelRatio,\r
        orientation: target?.type || "landscape-primary",\r
        isTouchDevice: "ontouchstart" in window || navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0,\r
        deviceMemory: (navigator as any).deviceMemory,\r
        hardwareConcurrency: navigator.hardwareConcurrency\r
      }));\r
    };\r
\r
    fetchPublicIp();\r
    fetchOs();\r
    updates();\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("resize", updates);\r
    window.screen.orientation?.addEventListener("change", updates);\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("resize", updates);\r
      window.screen.orientation?.removeEventListener("change", updates);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return info;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-device-info.ts"})]})}function f(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(u,{...n})}):u(n)}function l(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return b(I);})();
